title: Jahdoo
description: Jahdoo introduces a new magic system to Minecraft, centered around elemental wands and abilities.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f65be3bfda2504751036cbff56892ee9eb44e93f.png)

## Jahdoo Modpack
Jahdoo introduces a new magic system to Minecraft, centered around elemental wands and abilities. Players can cast a variety of spells, with a primary focus on damage-dealing magic, but also access to various utility spells that aid in everyday tasks like mining, farming, and more. Each spell aligns with elemental themes, offering unique effects and gameplay strategies.

|
[Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

## General 
Note: Jahdoo is currently in ALPHA. We welcome player feedback to help refine the mod for full release. Please download, share your opinions, and report any bugs you encounter. While in active development, gameplay features can and WILL change, so please keep in mind that certain elements may break or behave unexpectedly as updates roll out.

Short-Term Focuses:
- Implement 5-10 abilities per element, expanding the variety of spells.
- Develop a Wand Loyalty upgrade system where staying loyal to a specific wand unlocks perks that persist throughout the wand's lifetime.
- Add additional ability slots for wands, allowing players to hotswap spells while on the move.
- Introduce a melee weapon that synergizes with wands, offering mutual perks between the wand and weapon.
- Create an automation block where utility spells can be placed, enabling automation with spells players already use.
- Improve the quality and feedback of all abilities to enhance gameplay experience.

Long-Term:
- The ultimate goal is to create a new instance-based element for the game, inspired by horde-style survival modes.
- Players will enter a new dimension and face wave-based challenges, battling through hordes over multiple rounds.
- After several rounds, players will have the option to exit the instance or continue progressing for increasingly better rewards.
- Between rounds, there will be minigames to add variety and challenge.The instance will feature dynamic maps and environments that require strategic navigation and effort to traverse, enhancing the overall gameplay experience.
